functions.name: field_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a path resolves to a present value.

functions.name: equals_value
functions.description: Compares a path against an expected value.

functions.name: numeric_threshold
functions.description: Compares a numeric path against a threshold.

functions.name: type_check
functions.description: Validates a primitive type at a path.

functions.name: taxonomy_score
functions.description: Reads a taxonomy score for a named domain.

functions.name: tone_score
functions.description: Reads a tone score for a named tone cue.

functions.name: semantic_proximity
functions.description: Measures whether expanded semantic terms appear in a target text.

functions.name: shared_dimension
functions.description: Checks whether the relation endpoints share a dimension value.

functions.name: temporal_distance
functions.description: Measures year distance across relation endpoints.

functions.name: weighted_sum
functions.description: Aggregates several numeric inputs into a bounded score.

functions.name: threshold_gate
functions.description: Converts a raw numeric value into a pass/fail gate.

functions.name: preset_bias
functions.description: Reads preset weighting for a lens or a view target.

functions.name: enum_match
functions.description: Matches a path value against an enum list.

launchInstructions.note: If file:// blocks the YAML fetch, serve the folder over HTTP and keep glimpse.master.yaml beside the HTML entry point.
